reviews.author: Aurora Trevino
reviews.text: I recently hired a plumber in Dunwoody to replace both my main water line and sewer line, and I couldn't be happier with the experience. Bryan, the plumber who helped me out, really knew his stuff and took the time to explain everything in simple terms so I understood what was happening with my pipes. The job was done quickly and professionally, and the customer service was fantastic from start to finish.

reviews.author: Judith Stone
reviews.text: Sandy Springs Plumbing Heating Air Conditioning did an amazing job with my bathroom plumbing project. Jay was the plumber who helped me, and he explained every step of the process in a way that was easy to understand. They moved my shower, sink, and toilet to make the space work better for me, and the difference is huge.

reviews.author: Brandi Snyder
reviews.text: I was so relieved when I called for help with my clogged kitchen sink and the plumber was able to come out to my home in Dunwoody the same day. Levi showed up right on time and was both friendly and professional. He quickly figured out what was causing the blockage and got straight to work clearing out the pipe. In less than an hour, my kitchen sink was draining perfectly again.

reviews.author: Joshua Humphrey
reviews.text: The service I received was outstanding! Everyone was very professional and really went the extra mile to help with my plumbing emergency. They made sure my water issue was handled quickly and took it seriously from start to finish. Jay, the plumber who came out, was fantastic and clearly takes great pride in his work.

reviews.author: Brent P.
reviews.text: I always call Sandy Springs Plumbing Heating Air Conditioning whenever I have plumbing problems. Their team does an outstanding job and gets everything fixed right the first time, so I never have to worry about calling them back. I live in an older home, and they've updated my pipes and fixtures so everything works great now.

reviews.author: Maya K.
reviews.text: We've used this plumbing company a few times and have always been happy with the results. The first job was when Levi installed a toilet while we were building out our basement bathroom. Later, Pedro handled a shower installation, and it looked fantastic when finished!

counts.aggregate_rating_source: Google Business Profile supplied by Jesse 2026-04-17

notes: IDENTITY CONSOLIDATION: Two overlapping listings consolidated per Jesse's 2026-04-17 call. Authoritative address: 165 Hilderbrand Dr, Atlanta 30328. Authoritative rating: 4.9/25 Google. Excluded: Yelp 1.0/2 (stale, unrepresentative). 6 verbatim reviews supplied by Jesse from the GBP Reviews tab. NAMED TEAM FROM REVIEWS: Jack Sr. (owner) + Bryan, Jay, Levi, Todd, Pedro (plumbers). This named roster is a strong differentiator — used in hero, trust band, and exit copy. Reviews were lightly truncated for card display (first 2-3 sentences preserved verbatim); full original text archived in this file. Brent P.'s review had AI-assistant preamble 'Here's your revised review, following all requirements:' stripped as it's not part of the actual customer statement.

capture_attempts.reason: 6 verbatim reviews with named reviewers, dates, and technician names captured via Jesse relay
